title: Clinical Audiologist
description:
• Examine patients who have hearing, balance or related ear problem.
  • Assess the results of the examination and diagnose problems.
  • Fit and dispense patients with appropriate hearing aids or products based on each hearing condition.
  • Program hearing aids.
  • Counsel and follow-up with customers and their families.
  • Troubleshoot hearing instrument technical issues and if required, to send for laboratory repair
  • Maintenance of customer’s records
  • Manage daily clinic operations, cash flow and branch target
  • Replenish stock at branch
  • Ensure the maintenance and cleanliness of the branch
  • Regular visit to Hospital, ENT & GP to build rapport
  • Phone calls to customers i.e. reminder calls, follow-up calls with customers on hearing aids usage, KIV cases, etc.
  • Preparation of medical reports
  • Preparation of diagnostics test reports, scan and upload into system

Requirements

· Master/ Bachelor Degree in Audiology (Mandatory)

· Sales-driven

· Possess a caring disposition and understand customer’s needs.

· Able to balance between patient needs and meeting sales target.

· Able to engage with children and elderly

· Good phone etiquette and communication skills


Please sent your CV to ciln@demant.com. Thanks!

postedCompany.description:
DEMANT SINGAPORE PTE LTD

 

Demant is a world-leading hearing healthcare group that offers solutions and services to help people with hearing loss connect and communicate with the world around them. In every aspect, from hearing devices and hearing implants and diagnostic equipment to intelligent audio solutions and hearing care all over the world, Demant is active and engaged. Our innovative technologies and know-how help improve people’s health and hearing. We create life-changing differences through hearing health.


As a part of United Nations Global Compact, Demant supports the Sustainable Development Goals and aspires to promote their success. Contributing to healthy lives and well-being for all, offering sound to the brain and the access to life it brings, are the very core of our business.


Our ambition is to create positive changes in our sphere of influence, while conducting business responsibly and ensuring a long-term profile and reach. We are here to stay and to improve
